steps.title: Use the given form as the regression form
steps.content: The problem says $f(x)=ax+b$, so enter two table points and regress with the same letters: $y_1 \sim a x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read a and b
steps.content: Desmos gives $a=64$ and $b=-128$, so $f(x)=64x-128$. This checks because $f(1)=-64$ and $f(2)=0$.
